title: phaleria disperma
intro: Phaleria disperma, also known as Javanese Kutaj or Malay Tea, is a plant species native to Southeast Asia, characterized by its fragrant flowers and aromatic leaves. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. Its health benefits include reducing fever, treating digestive issues, and alleviating respiratory problems. In herbal preparations, Phaleria disperma can be used to make teas, infusions, and ointments, which are often used to treat various health conditions.
